case_title: DANA PATRICIA ELLSWORTH VS. JAMES BRANDT HUSTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-28-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-08-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLSWORTH, DANA PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT HUSTON, JAMES BRANDT HUSTON GENERAL CONTRACTING, INC. DOES 1 TO 11 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-14-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-22-2018
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-14-2018 CONTINUED TO MAR-28-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 18120033)
